behaviors.description: The speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels so that the summary can attribute statements to specific attendees.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real STT model output content (speaker diarization/labeling), which stubs can hide. Rejected Workflow: behavior text focuses on STT output preservation itself, not multiple model decisions in sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real audio sample with known speaker turns through the production STT path and assert speaker labels in transcript segments match expected attendees closely enough for downstream attribution.

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text) into the summary input structure.
behaviors.justification: This is deterministic parsing/structuring logic and can be validated at a local function/object boundary without real infra or model judgment. Rejected Integration: behavior text does not require cross-module/runtime interaction beyond parser logic.
behaviors.test_description: Given transcript text fixtures containing explicit assignments, assert the parser returns normalized `{assignee, task}` entries in the summary-input object shape.

behaviors.description: The live summary output contains at least one action item for every attendee who was assigned a task during the meeting.
behaviors.justification: This is LLM output quality/coverage behavior (did the model include all required attendee action items). Deterministic mocks would mask misses. Rejected Workflow: behavior does not explicitly require validating multiple sequential model decisions; it can be checked on transcript-to-summary generation.
behaviors.test_description: Feed real meeting transcript fixtures with known per-attendee assignments to the live summarization model and assert each assigned attendee appears with at least one action item in output.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction logic routes identified decisions into the `decisions` section schema rather than generic narrative fields.
behaviors.justification: Routing into the target schema is deterministic mapping logic once decisions are identified. No real infra or model output quality is required for this specific behavior. Rejected Integration: behavior text is about routing logic, not inter-service interaction.
behaviors.test_description: Given pre-identified decision items and mixed narrative content, assert mapper places decisions only in `decisions` schema fields and not in narrative fields.

behaviors.description: Key decisions mentioned in the transcript appear in the live summary's `decisions` section, not buried in the narrative.
behaviors.justification: This depends on real LLM judgment about salience/extraction and section placement; stubbed outputs create false confidence. Rejected Workflow: behavior can be validated on a single transcript-to-summary model step without requiring multi-agentic chaining.
behaviors.test_description: Use real transcript fixtures containing explicit key decisions, run live summarization, and assert those decisions are present in `decisions` section with acceptable semantic match and absent from narrative-only placement.

behaviors.description: When the audio file is longer than 60 minutes, the service splits it into segments and processes them sequentially, merging the results into a single coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires sequential multi-step processing with merged coherent output across segments; this chains multiple model-dependent steps (per-segment transcription/summarization and merge quality). Rejected System: real infra alone does not validate cross-step coherence from model outputs.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real >60-minute recording through production segmentation pipeline; verify ordered segment processing, successful merge, and final summary coherence/coverage across decisions and action items spanning different segments.

behaviors.description: The full pipeline (upload audio, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) completes without manual intervention for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: This is an end-to-end pipeline with multiple agentic stages (STT then LLM summarization) plus external boundaries. Avoiding false confidence requires validating full chained execution, not isolated calls.
behaviors.test_description: Execute a real meeting recording through the deployed pipeline (upload -> STT -> LLM summary -> output delivery), then assert successful completion status and valid structured payload containing expected sections without operator intervention.
